source_jobs.title: Staff Product Manager
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT THE COMPANY

At Headstart our mission is to bring companies into the age of intelligence and automate software development. We are the team behind the coding agent Friday and are building frontier applied AI technologies including agent orchestration, memory, and more.

We specialize in solving problems with the latest LLM capabilities that deliver measurable outcomes and breakthrough results for organizations in many different industries. As the technology continues to advance at an unprecedented rate, we provide companies with custom software solutions and a suite of tools to stay ahead of the intelligence curve.




ABOUT THE TEAM

We are a lean, high-velocity team that ships breakthrough AI capabilities at startup speed. We work directly with our users, iterate rapidly, and measure success by the real-world impact we create for our clients. We believe that simplicity and product fundamentals are more important than ever in an AI driven world.




ABOUT THE ROLE

 - Lead product strategy and execution across complex enterprise engagements, from discovery through multi-SOW roadmaps and long-term platform vision.

 - Shape Headstart's cross-client product strategy by identifying patterns, building reusable frameworks, and scaling AI product delivery.

 - Own AI product quality end-to-end, defining success metrics, evaluation frameworks, guardrails, and production-readiness standards alongside engineering and leadership.

 - Turn delivery learnings into internal product IP, including telemetry standards, analytics boilerplates, and agentic curriculum.

 - Navigate complex stakeholder dynamics, build executive relationships, drive SOW expansion, and push back when it improves outcomes.

 - Lead 0→1 validation of AI products through rapid prototyping and fast iteration, advising senior client leaders on AI operating models and translating technical tradeoffs into business outcomes.




YOUR BACKGROUND

 - 8+ years of product management in B2B SaaS, enterprise AI, or applied AI/ML, with a track record owning multi-phase, multi-stakeholder engagements from scoping through production.

 - Platform-level operator who builds frameworks, standards, and reusable IP that outlast individual engagements.

 - Comfortable working in AI/ML systems, including agent architectures, retrieval, evaluation pipelines, observability, LLM behavior, and the tradeoffs around model choice, latency, cost, and safety.

 - Strong judgment for AI product quality and readiness, with a track record defining success metrics and measurable business outcomes, not just shipping features.

 - Exceptional writing skills, producing clear, durable strategy docs, client specs, and internal frameworks.

 - Comfortable advising senior client leaders on AI operating models, investment priorities, and change management, translating technical complexity into business decisions.



Note: Even if you don't meet all the requirements, we still encourage you to apply. This role offers extensive benefits, a base salary of $240,000 USD plus competitive equity compensation, 401k with employer match, fully covered medical, dental, and vision premiums, monthly wellness stipend, free lunch everyday in our NYC office, Citi Bike + pre-tax commuter benefits, and 12 weeks parental leave with an optional 4-week ramp-up at a 50% schedule.

While this position is listed as hybrid in NYC or Toronto, we are open to considering fully remote candidates based in the US or Canada for the right fit.

source_jobs.title: Senior, Applied AI Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT THE COMPANY

Headstart https://www.headstart.nyc/ is built for people who want to think like founders. We work inside real enterprises ($100M+ ARR) shipping production AI systems that change how they operate. Every engagement is a different industry, a different problem, and a different set of constraints. You leave each one knowing that business deeply.

We've built our own agent Friday, which powers the majority of how we deliver. We're bootstrapped, cash-flow positive, and growing fast.




WHY JOIN US

The engineers who thrive at Headstart are the ones who want to understand how businesses work, not just how code works. We take the work seriously and the culture deliberately. Pay is transparent, weekends are yours, and we don't confuse long hours with good work. We have a sun-drenched loft office in NYC and a remote-friendly culture to support those outside of NYC.




ABOUT THE ROLE

 - Own client engagements end-to-end, from technical discovery and scoping through to production

 - Work directly with enterprise clients, translating ambiguous business problems into concrete technical scope

 - Ship production AI systems across multiple domains and stacks: agents, LLM workflows, document processing, and the infrastructure that makes them reliable

 - Contribute to Friday and the Headstart Platform via patterns, skills, and infrastructure that compound across every engagement

 - Raise the bar for the engineers around you through code review, pairing, and shared standards
   
   


YOUR BACKGROUND

 - 5+ years of engineering experience with a track record of owning systems end-to-end

 - Comfortable in client-facing situations, running discovery, earning trust quickly, and shaping what gets built

 - Your instincts and standards are contagious and teammates adopt them naturally

 - You use AI tools constantly, creatively, and with good judgment about when not to

 - Proven full-stack depth: backend services (Python), datastores (SQL/NoSQL), optionally React/Next.js

 - Experience designing distributed systems, APIs, data pipelines, or developer productivity infrastructure at scale

 - Bonus if you’ve been a founding engineer or startup early hire, with history building production products from scratch

 - Bonus if you’re NYC based — we have a loft office in Soho and provide lunch and snacks
   
   

Note: Even if you don't meet all the requirements, we still encourage you to apply. This role offers extensive benefits, a base salary of $200,000 USD plus competitive equity compensation, 401k with employer match, fully covered medical, dental, and vision premiums, monthly wellness stipend, free lunch everyday in our NYC office, Citi Bike + pre-tax commuter benefits, and 12 weeks parental leave with an optional 4-week ramp-up at a 50% schedule.

While this position is listed as hybrid in NYC or Toronto, we are open to considering fully remote candidates based in the US or Canada for the right fit.

source_jobs.title: Staff, Applied AI Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT THE COMPANY

Headstart https://www.headstart.nyc/ is built for people who want to think like founders. We work inside real enterprises ($100M+ ARR) shipping production AI systems that change how they operate. Every engagement is a different industry, a different problem, and a different set of constraints. You leave each one knowing that business deeply.

We've built our own agent Friday, which powers the majority of how we deliver. We're bootstrapped, cash-flow positive, and growing fast.

 


WHY JOIN US

The engineers who thrive at Headstart are the ones who want to understand how businesses work, not just how code works. We work inside real enterprises, shipping production AI systems that change how they operate. We take the work seriously and the culture deliberately. Pay is transparent, weekends are yours, and we don't confuse long hours with good work.




ABOUT THE ROLE

 - Lead and own multiple client engagements end-to-end, from ideation and technical discovery through to production

 - Prototype rapidly while ensuring long-term reliability, maintainability, and security

 - Balance multiple concurrent engagements, context-switching between different technical stacks and business domains

 - Contribute to the Headstart Platform roadmap by identifying and delivering the highest-leverage investments across our tooling and infrastructure

 - Shape client strategy by reframing problems, influencing priorities, and defining what the right path forward looks like

 - Be the technical authority in sales and scoping conversations

 - Grow the engineers around you and raise the floor of every project you work on
   
   


YOUR BACKGROUND

 - 7+ years of professional software engineering experience with a track record of owning complex, high-stakes systems end-to-end

 - Been the technical authority in rooms with executives and clients and have shaped what got built, not just built what you were told

 - Experience creatively applying AI in the development lifecycle, and knowing when not to

 - Enjoys a fast-paced and collaborative environment

 - Have owned client relationships at the executive level: running discovery, navigating difficult conversations, and earning trust quickly

 - Proven full-stack depth: backend services (Python), datastores, React/Next.js, optionally ML

 - Experience designing distributed systems, APIs, data pipelines, or developer productivity infrastructure at scale

 - Bonus if you’ve been a founding engineer or startup early hire, with history building production products from scratch

 - Bonus if you’re NYC based — we have a loft office in Soho and provide lunch and snacks
   
   

Note: Even if you don't meet all the requirements, we still encourage you to apply. This role offers extensive benefits, a base salary of $240,000 USD plus competitive equity compensation, 401k with employer match, fully covered medical, dental, and vision premiums, monthly wellness stipend, free lunch everyday in our NYC office, Citi Bike + pre-tax commuter benefits, and 12 weeks parental leave with an optional 4-week ramp-up at a 50% schedule.

While this position is listed as hybrid in NYC or Toronto, we are open to considering fully remote candidates based in the US or Canada for the right fit.

notes: AI-focused company with a strong engineering core
